title: Restart temporal worker for new listings cron

log.context: Restart temporal worker for new listings cron

The service is now `active (running)`. The heartbeat queue-full messages in the log are from a previously running workflow activity (not a crash), and the worker process is healthy.

Summary:

The restart initially failed due to a typo introduced in a recent edit to `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/discord_ingest_act.py` — line 19 imported `MAIN_MAIN_CHANNEL_ID` (doubled "MAIN_") instead of the correct `MAIN_CHANNEL_ID`.
